title: Moar Totems
description: The Moar Totems datapack adds new totem types to the game, in three main types. Life-saving ones that also do something unique. Ones that give an infinite buff when a condition is met, and ones that can be placed into the world for an AOE effect.
body:
Moar Totems

The Moar Totems datapack adds new totem types to the game, in three main types. Life-saving ones that also do something unique. Ones that give an infinite buff when a condition is met, and ones that can be placed into the world for an AOE effect.

You can craft them in the Vanilla Crafting Table. All recipes can all be found HERE, or in-game in the Recipe Guide

The datapack REQUIRES this Library, as well as this Resource Pack.

Learn more from this video:

Free Totems

  • Budget Totem of Undying:
    • Saves your life, but doesn’t do much more than that. Craftable with a cheap recipe.

  • Ghost Totem:
    • Makes you completely invisible for 10 seconds on when used.

  • Totem of Fire:
    • Makes you immune to fire damage when below 2.5 hearts.

  • Totem of Water:
    • Makes you immune to drowning when below 2 hearts.

  • Totem of Rage:
    • Gives massive speed and damage buffs when below 2.5 hearts.

  • Blast Totem:
    • Causes a damaging explosion when activated. Doesn’t cause world damage.

  • Ender Totem:
    • Saves you from falling into the void. Places you on nearby land if there is some near.

  • Totem of Karma:
    • Debuffs your ‘Killer’ with slowness 3 and weakness 2 for ten seconds.

  • Totem of Protection 1:
    • Spawns a very helpful snow golem to protect you when activated.

  • Totem of Protection 2:
    • Summons a half health iron golem to protect you when activated.

  • TNT Totem:
    • Makes you completely immune to TNT damage. Doesn’t save you from creepers… or fall damage.

Patron Exclusive Totems ($1+)

  • Totem of Defence:
    • Places an Aura of Defence that reduces damage taken to all players inside it.

  • Totem of Regeneration:
    • Places an Aura of Healing that heals all players inside of it.

  • Totem of Experience:
    • Places an Aura of Experience that doubles the value of all XP orbs inside it.

  • Totem of Shielding:
    • Places an Aura of Shielding that blocks all projectiles.

  • Totem of Withering:
    • Places an Aura of Withering that hurts everything inside of it, besides the user.
